headline: Forget Stagflation - This Is The Kind Of Market Where I Start Building Positions
summary: Bullish S&P 500 outlook: why cyclical value, asset managers (ARES, BN) and gold streamers (FNV, AEM) look attractive amid stagflation risks. See more here.

headline: Curtiss-Wright, FTAI Infrastructure, American Superconductor, Fortune Brands, and Builders FirstSource Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East raised concerns over higher inflation and a potential economic slowdown.
